title: Malaysian-Style Satay Chicken
description: A classic Southeast Asian dish, this recipe features marinated chicken grilled to perfection and served with a side of peanut sauce. Perfect for a quick and flavorful dinner.
instructions: In a blender or food processor, combine coconut milk, coriander, cumin, paprika, and salt. Blend until smooth.
Add the blended mixture to a large bowl and add the chicken breast. Mix well to coat.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Remove the chicken from the marinade, letting any excess liquid drip off.
Grill the chicken for 5-7 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, heat the peanut oil in a small saucepan over medium heat.
Add the peanuts and cook, stirring frequently, until fragrant and lightly toasted.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and stir in the lime juice.
Serve the grilled chicken with the peanut sauce and garnish with kalamansi, if desired.
